name: CV Stack
description: Section 03 — stack. Pill-style tabs switch between groups; each group lists key/value rows with a dashed bottom border. Languages row appears below.

sub_fields.label: Rows (one per line, format: 'Name || Value')
sub_fields.help: Each line becomes a stack-row. Separator is ' || ' (space, double-pipe, space).

sub_fields.label: Code
sub_fields.help: ISO-style language code, e.g. EN, ES, DE.

test_data.heading: What I actually use.
test_data.sub: Not every logo in existence — just the things I reach for on a Tuesday.
